P.S. 1: I decided to re-upload this bot to keep things fair and square. I’ll admit: I "cheated" a little with the promotion last time because I really wanted this work to be noticed (algorithms are a pain!). But yeah, I won’t do that anymore. Mostly because I feel like my work can grow on its own now, especially since my audience (you guys, my favorites!) has grown so much lately.

P.S. 2: A quick clarification for my followers: as you might have guessed from P.S. 1, I am a girl. Initially, I kept a neutral or male persona online for safety and to keep the focus purely on the bots, but I’ve decided it’s time to be open about it.

P.S. 3: Comments are disabled for now, and I might be busy for a while (a month or so). Honestly, it’s for the best — it gave me the push I needed to fully finish this bot before taking a break.

P.S. 4: Reason for the break: After a recent clash with a user (I won't mention names without permission), I seriously re-evaluated how I spend my time and how much of it goes into Janitor.ai.(It’s mostly you guys’ fault, honestly, because your comments and follows get me way tooooooo hyped up!! But Goooood...5+hours in chat is not normal.) Also, being called "the guy" doesn't sit right with me in the long run (and I plan to stay on Janitor for a long time), so I wanted to clear that up with my followers. So yeah, I'm on vacation.💜

P.S. 5: More work updates: Expect bots for Dick and Tim in the future, as well
